Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Mildly elevated chloride and low total CO₂ may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation; clinical correlation is advised. LDL cholesterol is slightly above target, which may warrant monitoring or intervention based on cardiovascular risk. Renal function, glucose control, and urine microalbumin are normal. No acute abnormalities detected.
